item.title: ZM Stock Gains Spotlight After Spruce Point Issues Rare ‘Buy’ Call – Recommends Turnaround Plan For ‘Pandemic Darling’
item.description: Spruce Point Capital Management issued a ‘strong buy’ call on Zoom, saying the stock is materially undervalued.

item.title: AMD Has 'Meaningful Upside' Ahead Of Earnings Due To Magnitude Of Intel's Q1 Beat, Says Analyst Who Hiked Price Target By 70%
item.description: DA Davidson hiked its price target for AMD to $375 from $220, stating that Intel’s earnings beat could be a precursor to a huge step up in AMD’s CPU f...

item.title: Meta Taps Amazon’s Graviton Chips To Power AI Buildout – Raises Stakes Ahead Of Earnings Next Week
item.description: Meta will deploy “tens of millions” of Amazon’s AWS Graviton cores across its data centers.

item.title: Tradr Launches Leveraged ETFs on AXTI, CPNG, MPWR and STX
FDA Fast-Tracks Psychedelic Research After Trump’s Executive Order — CMPS, HELP Stocks Gain
item.description: The FDA stated that this will increase support for psychedelic-based medicines for the treatment of conditions like post-traumatic stress disorder, tr...
